# opnsense_interface_loopback (Data Source)

Reads a loopback interface on OPNsense by its UUID.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description.
- `device_id` (Number) Loopback device number (auto-assigned by OPNsense).
